title: Surgeries - Orkney and Shetland Liberal Democrats
text_excerpt: Surgeries - Orkney and Shetland Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Orkney and Shetland Liberal Democrats About Volunteer Parliamentary Offices News Surgeries Donate Join Donate Join About Orkney & Shetland About Alistair Record of Delivery Surgeries UPCOMING SURGERIES IN ORKNEY Please telephone the Kirkwall office in advance on 01856 876541 to book an appointment. UPCOMING SURGERIES IN SHETLAND Lerwick - Friday 24th April, 1-2pm at the Constituency Office, 171 Commercial St No appointment is necessary. Call 01595 690044 for further information. The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
